Apple Inc. is a technology company headquartered in Cupertino, California. The company was founded in 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne. Apple designs and sells consumer electronics, software, and online services.

Jobs served as CEO of Apple until 2011. Tim Cook succeeded him as chief executive. Wozniak left Apple in 1985 but remained a stockholder.

Apple's headquarters, Apple Park, is located in Cupertino. The campus opened in 2017.
